name: parvalon
description: The missing corporate-actions layer for tokenized stocks. On-chain dividends, splits, and record-date semantics for Robinhood Chain.

scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:ts
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast
scripts.seed:local: cd contracts && forge script script/Seed.s.sol:Seed --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast
